opportunity_summary: KDDI containerized immersion cooling DC at MHI Yokohama Hardtech Hub. PUE below 1.07 verified. 50kVA server load, 53.5kVA total. GIGABYTE R282-Z93/R182-Z91 rack servers.
notes: Container-type edge DC; small scale qualifies. 43% power reduction vs air cooling. 94% cooling energy reduction demonstrated.

opportunity_summary: KDDI demonstration achieved PUE 1.05 with immersion cooling at Oyama Network Center. 94% reduction in cooling energy vs conventional air cooling.
notes: Demonstration/pilot site. Exact MW unknown but container-type suggests small scale.

facility_name: KDDI Osaka Sakai AI Data Center
opportunity_summary: Former Sharp LCD plant converted to AI DC in ~6 months. Hybrid cooling (air + DLC). NVIDIA AI infra via HPE partnership. General service applications from April 2026.
notes: Opening early 2026. Acquired April 2025. PUE not yet disclosed but DLC confirmed.

facility_name: IIJ Shiroi Data Center Campus Phase 3
opportunity_summary: Phase 3 building at Shiroi campus: 10MW initial (expandable to 25MW), 1,000 racks, 5,400 sqm. DLC-ready design with reserved pipe routing. Construction began June 2025, operational FY2026.
notes: PUE ~1.2 range. Qualifies on MW (10MW) and liquid cooling readiness. AI workload focus.

opportunity_summary: PFN/IIJ/JAIST AImod: direct liquid-cooled high-density AI servers. Design pPUE 1.1 (free cooling mode), 1.2 annual average. 30 server nodes with 256 MN-Core 2 AI processors. NEDO-funded. Test ops July 2025, full-scale April 2026.
notes: Research collaboration for ultra-high-efficiency AI computing. 7:3 water:air cooling ratio. Supply water temp adjustable 17-45C.

cooling_type: Hybrid cold-plate liquid cooling + magnetic levitation phase-change air
opportunity_summary: 350MW+ campus with 30,000+ racks. PUE 1.13 verified. Hybrid liquid+air cooling system developed with HEC Group. Industry standards development for cold-plate LC in China.
notes: Exceeds 10MW but PUE 1.13 and verified liquid cooling qualify. Originally built 2018, acquired by HEC-led consortium 2025.

cooling_type: Plate liquid cooling (R&D with Shanghai Jiao Tong University)
opportunity_summary: National Green Data Center (3 consecutive years). Best annual PUE 1.15 (2022). ~90,000 sqm. Plate liquid cooling R&D with SJTU. Building 2 PUE 1.27, WUE 0.995 L/kWh (2023). 100% green power for Building 2.
notes: Company-best PUE 1.15 verified. Operational since end of 2021.

opportunity_summary: World's largest server cluster submerged in liquid coolant at time of deployment. PUE 1.09 verified. 70%+ energy reduction vs conventional cooling. Servers submerged in special insulating coolant, no fans/AC needed.
notes: PUE 1.09 qualifies. Part of Alibaba's five 'Super Data Centers'. Immersion cooling pioneer in China.

facility_name: ITCen-Aquatron Carbon Neutral AI Data Center
opportunity_summary: MOU signed for carbon-neutral AI DC in South Korea. Target PUE 1.051. Captures 95% of carbon for green cement. Energy from natural gas, hydrogen, ammonia.
notes: Announced/MOU stage. Exact location TBD. PUE is target, not measured. Coordinates approximate (Seoul default).

opportunity_summary: ICN10 in Seoul Digital Media City with Air-Assisted Liquid Cooling (AALC). Supports 70kW per rack for high-performance GPU servers. KakaoBank AI lab tenant (Feb 2024). AWS Direct Connect access.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (AALC verified). 70kW/rack density. Network-neutral facility.

facility_name: LG Uplus Pyeongchon 2 IDC (Liquid Cooling Demo)
opportunity_summary: LG Uplus liquid cooling demo room at Pyeongchon 2 IDC. Direct-to-chip (cold plate + CDU) for high-density GPU servers. Partners: Vertiv, CoolIT, LG Electronics, GST. Verification started Sept 2025. Largest DC in Seoul metro area.
notes: Demo/verification stage at existing facility. Results will inform Paju AIDC (under construction, 2027 completion).

facility_name: LG Uplus Paju AI Data Center
cooling_type: Liquid cooling (LG Electronics + LG Energy Solution systems)
opportunity_summary: US$441.7M investment in Paju AI DC. Liquid cooling from LG Electronics, power from LG Energy Solution. Under construction, completion 2027. 'One LG' integrated approach.
notes: Major investment. LC confirmed but specific cooling type TBD pending Pyeongchon 2 trials.

facility_name: LG Electronics Pyeongtaek Immersion Cooling Testbed
cooling_type: Liquid immersion cooling (GRC tanks + SK Enmove fluids + LG CDU/FWU/chillers)
opportunity_summary: MOU signed Oct 2025 between LG, SK Enmove, GRC for immersion cooling solutions. Pyeongtaek testbed expanding from liquid cooling PoC to add immersion. LG integrates CDUs/FWUs/chillers, SKEN supplies thermal fluids, GRC provides tank design.
notes: Testbed/PoC facility. SK Enmove was first Korean company to develop immersion cooling fluids (2022). DCIM platform also being developed.

opportunity_summary: AI-ready hyperscale DC at Genting Lane campus. 186,610 sqft, 7 stories. Completed early 2025. Designed for liquid cooling fit-out. Part of S$1.38B divestment to Keppel DC REIT. Lease secured to 2050.
notes: LC not yet deployed but facility designed for it. Qualifies on LC-ready design for AI inference workloads.

cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling + rear-door heat exchangers
opportunity_summary: Equinix 4th Osaka IBX. 14.4MW IT power, 4,925 sqm. Chillers and pipes in each data hall supporting DLC and rear-door HX. Part of global 100+ DC liquid cooling rollout.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (verified) and capacity (14.4MW). PUE not disclosed.

opportunity_summary: US$124M investment. 6th HK IBX. Liquid cooling for AI workloads. PUE target 1.2 or lower. 100% renewable energy. Operational Q1 2026. Partners: Dell Technologies, Schneider Electric.
notes: PUE 1.2 is target, not measured. Qualifies on liquid cooling and target PUE.

opportunity_summary: US$260M investment. 6th Singapore IBX. 20MW. DLC-only (condenser water, not chilled water for efficiency). Renewable energy PPA with Sembcorp. Expected open Q1 2027.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (DLC verified). Uses condenser water instead of chilled water for increased efficiency.

cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling + indirect evaporative cooling (IEC)
opportunity_summary: AirTrunk's first APAC deployment of direct-to-chip liquid cooling. 150MW initial (100MW expansion underway). Design PUE 1.15. 10.3 hectares. Rooftop solar with Pekat Solar. NVIDIA DGX-ready colocation partner.
notes: First APAC liquid cooling deployment for AirTrunk. PUE 1.15 design verified. Qualifies on LC and PUE. 23% energy reduction from DLC.

cooling_type: Hybrid dry-coolers + water-cooled chillers (172 dry-coolers, 86 chillers)
opportunity_summary: Largest single campus in APAC (ex-China). 320MW+ across 9 phases, 8.3 hectares. Design PUE 1.15. 132kV onsite substation. 80% less water than traditional DC.
notes: PUE 1.15 qualifies. Liquid cooling not explicitly confirmed but infrastructure could support it. Water-cooled chillers are part of cooling plant.

facility_name: Bridge Data Centres Ulu Tiram Campus
opportunity_summary: 400MW campus with Malaysia's first large-scale Water Treatment Plant for cooling. Cold plate LC deployed at scale for AI workloads. Among first hyperscale operators in region with LC at scale.
notes: Exceeds 10MW but qualifies on verified liquid cooling. WTP operational since 2025.

opportunity_summary: 12MW capacity. Completed July 2025 (ahead of schedule). Optional liquid cooling system for customers. Brings AIMS total to 100MW+ in Klang Valley. Largest DC capacity in Cyberjaya.
notes: Qualifies on 12MW capacity and liquid cooling option. Completed ahead of Q2 2025 target.

facility_name: Submer Madhya Pradesh Liquid-Cooled AI DC
operator_company: Submer Technologies / Government of Madhya Pradesh
cooling_type: Immersion cooling + direct-to-chip + hybrid liquid cooling
opportunity_summary: MOU signed July 28, 2025 for up to 1GW of liquid-cooled AI DCs in Madhya Pradesh. Zero water consumption design. Immersion + DLC + hybrid methods. Local supply chain development included.
notes: MOU stage, locations TBD. Coordinates approximate (Bhopal). 1GW total target across multiple facilities. Qualifies on liquid cooling commitment.

state_province_region: Australian Capital Territory / New South Wales
opportunity_summary: Proprietary LiquidCore cooling technology across all campuses. WUE 0.01 via closed-loop (fill once, circulate for life). Zero potable water consumption. Saves 5 gigalitres/year. Nearly 20 years of liquid cooling experience.
notes: Pioneer in Australian liquid cooling. Exact PUE not found in sources but WUE 0.01 is industry-leading. Multiple campus locations.
